name: State GIS Portal
objective: Create a comprehensive geospatial data portal covering land records, infrastructure, and utilities for Telangana.
outcomes: Digitized 8 cities with 15,000+ infrastructure assets mapped and accessible to planners.

name: Urban Mobility GIS
objective: GIS-based transit network analysis and accessibility mapping for Bengaluru's multimodal transport system.
outcomes: Reduced average commute planning time by 22% for 2 lakh daily commuters.

name: Cotton Crop GIS
objective: Spatial crop monitoring and mandi mapping for cotton supply chain optimization in Gujarat.
outcomes: Improved cotton price realization by 22% for 5,000 farmers through transparent grading.

name: Chennai Metro GIS
objective: Geospatial asset management system for Chennai Metro rail network and station facilities.
outcomes: Digitized 45 km metro corridor with real-time asset tracking and maintenance scheduling.

name: Aquifer Mapping GIS
objective: Groundwater aquifer delineation and recharge zone mapping using hydrogeological GIS analysis.
outcomes: Mapped 500 sq km of aquifers benefiting 20,000 farmers in semi-arid regions.

name: Forest Cover Change GIS
objective: Temporal forest cover change detection and carbon sequestration mapping for sustainability reporting.
outcomes: Monitored 12,000 sq km of forest cover with annual change reports for policy makers.
